front: Eu montei um cronograma de treinos para os próximos três meses.
pronunciation: ew mohn-TAY oong kroo-noo-GRAH-mah jee TRAY-noos PAH-rah ooz PROH-see-moos trays MEH-zees.
back: I set up a training schedule for the next three months.
context: Discussing fitness planning blocks using 'cronograma de treinos'.

front: Costumo intercalar dias de corrida com treinos em casa.
pronunciation: koos-TOO-moo een-tehr-kah-LAHR JEE-ahs jee koh-HEE-dah koong TRAY-noos ahyng KAH-zah.
back: I usually alternate running days with home workouts.
context: Describing active lifestyle pacing using the precise verb 'intercalar'.

front: Prefiro desodorantes sem sais de alumínio na composição.
pronunciation: preh-FEE-roo jeh-zoo-doo-RAHN-chees sayng sys jee ah-loo-MEE-nyoo nah kohm-poo-zee-SOHNG.
back: I prefer deodorants without aluminum salts in the composition.
context: Expressing an explicit consumer care safety preference for clean, aluminum-free products.

front: Fazer ioga pela manhã ajuda a melhorar a flexibilidade.
pronunciation: fah-ZEHR ee-OH-gah PEH-lah mah-NYAH ah-ZHOO-dah ah meh-lyo-RAHR ah flehk-see-bee-lee-DAH-jee.
back: Doing yoga in the morning helps improve flexibility.
context: Stating health optimization benefits using the noun 'ioga'.

front: Eu faço exercícios em casa usando o peso do corpo.
pronunciation: ew FAH-soo eh-zehr-SEE-syoos ahyng KAH-zah oo-ZAHN-doo oo PEH-zoo doo COHR-pooo.
back: I do exercises at home using body weight.
context: Describing equipment-free fitness setups via 'peso do corpo'.

front: Amanhã pretendo correr cinco quilômetros no parque.
pronunciation: ah-mah-NYAH prah-TEHN-doo koh-HEHR SEENG-koo kee-LOH-meh-troos noo PAHR-kee.
back: Tomorrow I plan to run five kilometers in the park.
context: Stating goal targets using 'pretendo correr' (I plan/intend to run).

front: O pilates é excelente para fortalecer a musculatura do core.
pronunciation: oo pee-LAH-chees eh eyks-eh-LEHN-chee PAH-rah fohr-tah-leh-SEHR ah moos-koo-lah-TOO-rah doo core.
back: Pilates is excellent for strengthening the core muscles.
context: Discussing targeted low-intensity physical routines using 'fortalecer'.

front: É importante ler o rótulo para escolher produtos com ingredientes limpos.
pronunciation: eh eeym-pohr-TAHN-chee layr oo HOH-too-loo PAH-rah ees-koo-LYEHR proo-DOO-toos koong een-greh-jee-EHN-chees LEEYM-poos.
back: It is important to read the label to choose products with clean ingredients.
context: Advocating for self-care awareness via reading labels ('ler o rótulo').

front: Hoje vou fazer apenas uma caminhada leve para recuperar.
pronunciation: OH-zhee vow fah-ZEHR ah-PEH-nah OO-mah kah-meeny-AH-dah LEH-vee PAH-rah heh-koo-peh-RAHR.
back: Today I am going to do just a light walk to recover.
context: Describing active recovery strategies using 'caminhada leve'.

front: Manter uma rotina de autocuidado faz bem para a mente.
pronunciation: mahn-TEHR OO-mah hoo-CHEE-nah jee ow-too-kwee-DAH-doo faz bayyng PAH-rah ah MEHN-chee.
back: Maintaining a self-care routine is good for the mind.
context: Linking holistic mental health benefits with 'rotina de autocuidado'.

front: Qual é a sua meta de passos por dia?
pronunciation: kwaw eh ah SOO-ah MEH-tah jee PAHS-oos poor JEE-ah?
back: What is your daily step goal?
context: Querying structural fitness metrics using 'meta de passos'.

front: Eu comprei um tênis novo específico para corrida de rua.
pronunciation: ew kohm-PRAY oong TEH-nees NOH-voo ees-peh-SEE-fee-koo PAH-rah koh-HEH-dah jee HOO-ah.
back: I bought new sneakers specific for road running.
context: Discussing athletic footwear configurations using 'tênis' and 'corrida de rua'.

front: Sinto que o meu condicionamento físico melhorou muito.
pronunciation: SEEYN-too kee oo mew kohn-jee-syo-nah-MEHN-too FEE-zee-koo meh-lyo-ROY MOOI-too.
back: I feel that my physical conditioning has improved a lot.
context: Tracking personal physiological progress using 'condicionamento físico'.

front: Tento beber pelo menos dois litros de água diariamente.
pronunciation: TEHYN-too beh-BEHR PEH-loo MEH-noos doys LEE-troos jee AH-gwah jee-ah-ryah-MEHN-chee.
back: I try to drink at least two liters of water daily.
context: Describing fundamental hydration targets using 'diariamente'.

front: Eu evito cosméticos que contêm parabenos e sulfatos.
pronunciation: ew ee-VEE-too coos-MEH-chee-koos kee coohn-TAYNG pah-rah-BEH-noos ee soow-FAH-toos.
back: I avoid cosmetics that contain parabens and sulfates.
context: Highlighting conscious consumer behavior regarding clean product selections.

front: Um bom alongamento antes do treino previne lesões.
pronunciation: oong boong ah-loong-gah-MEHN-too AHN-chees doo TRAY-noo prah-VEE-nee leh-ZOHNGS.
back: A good stretch before working out prevents injuries.
context: Stating injury prevention steps using 'alongamento' and 'lesões'.

front: Qual aplicativo você usa para monitorar a sua corrida?
pronunciation: kwaw ah-plee-kah-CHEE-voo voh-SEH OO-zah PAH-rah moo-nee-too-RAHR ah SOO-ah koh-HEH-dah?
back: Which app do you use to track your run?
context: Inquiring about running performance logging setups using 'monitorar'.

front: Minhas pernas estão cansadas por causa do treino de ontem.
pronunciation: MEENG-yahs PEHR-nahs ees-TAHONG kahn-SAH-dahs poor KOW-zah doo TRAY-noo jee OHN-teeyng.
back: My legs are tired because of yesterday's workout.
context: Expressing muscle fatigue post-exercise parameters using 'cansadas'.

front: Eu prefiro marcas de sabonete que usam ingredientes naturais.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo MAHR-kahs jee sah-boo-NEH-chee kee OO-zahyng een-greh-jee-EHN-chees nah-too-RAYS.
back: I prefer soap brands that use natural ingredients.
context: Detailing clean personal hygiene preferences using 'ingredientes naturais'.

front: O descanso também é parte fundamental do processo.
pronunciation: oo dees-KAHN-soo tahm-BAYM eh PAHR-chee foon-dah-mehn-TAW doo proo-SEHS-oo.
back: Rest is also a fundamental part of the process.
context: Emphasizing workout recovery loops using the noun 'descanso'.

front: Eu faço uma sessão rápida de meditação para acalmar.
pronunciation: ew FAH-soo OO-mah seh-SOHNG HAH-pee-dah jee meh-jee-tah-SOHNG PAH-rah ah-kaw-MAHR.
back: I do a quick session of meditation to calm down.
context: Discussing mental health centering habits using 'sessão de meditação'.

front: Correr no asfalto exige mais das articulações do que na esteira.
pronunciation: koh-HEHR noo ahs-FAW-too eh-ZHEE-zhee mays dahs ahr-chee-koo-lah-SOHNGS doo kee nah ees-TAY-rah.
back: Running on asphalt demands more from the joints than on the treadmill.
context: Contrasting environment impacts using 'asfalto' vs. 'esteira' (treadmill).

front: Procuro manter o foco na postura correta durante os exercícios.
pronunciation: proo-KOO-roo mahn-TEHR oo FOH-koo nah poos-TOO-rah coo-HEH-tah doo-RAHN-chee ooz eh-zehr-SEE-syoos.
back: I try to keep focus on correct posture during the exercises.
context: Highlighting form safety in fitness using 'postura correta'.

front: Esse hidratante corporal é livre de fragrâncias artificiais.
pronunciation: EHS-ee ee-drah-TAHN-chee coohr-poo-RAW eh LEE-vree jee frah-GRAHN-syahs ahr-chee-fee-sy-AYS.
back: This body moisturizer is free of artificial fragrances.
context: Describing clean skincare traits using 'livre de' (free of).

front: Amanhã é meu dia de descanso da corrida.
pronunciation: ah-mah-NYAH eh mew JEE-ah jee dees-KAHN-soo dah koh-HEH-dah.
back: Tomorrow is my rest day from running.
context: Declaring scheduling structural breaks via 'dia de descanso'.

front: A regularidade é o segredo para ver resultados no treino.
pronunciation: ah heh-goo-lah-ree-DAH-jee eh oo seh-GREH-doo PAH-rah vayr heh-zool-TAH-doos noo TRAY-noo.
back: Consistency is the secret to seeing results in training.
context: Praising disciplined persistence layouts using 'regularidade' (consistency).

front: Eu sinto muita disposição depois de suar a camisa.
pronunciation: ew SEEYN-too MOOI-too jeees-poo-zee-SOHNG jee-POYS jee soo-AHR ah kah-MEE-zah.
back: I feel a lot of energy/disposition after sweating it out.
context: Using the popular fitness idiom 'suar a camisa' (literally, to sweat the shirt).

front: Minha frequência cardíaca sobe rápido durante a subida.
pronunciation: MEENG-yah freh-KWEHYN-syah kahr-JEE-ah-kah SOH-bee HAH-pee-doo doo-RAHN-chee ah soo-BEE-dah.
back: My heart rate goes up fast during the uphill climb.
context: Tracking cardio performance biometric variations using 'frequência cardíaca'.

front: Estou tentando melhorar meu ritmo de corrida por quilômetro.
pronunciation: ees-TOY tehn-TAHN-doo meh-lyo-RAHR mew REET-moo jee koh-HEH-dah poor kee-LOH-meh-troo.
back: I am trying to improve my running pace per kilometer.
context: Discussing athletic progression; in running contexts, 'ritmo' means pace.

front: Eu mudei para um shampoo natural sem sulfato.
pronunciation: ew moo-DAY PAH-rah oong shampoo nah-too-RAW sayng soow-FAH-too.
back: I switched to a natural, sulfate-free shampoo.
context: Stating hair-care changes aligned with clean ingredient parameters.

front: Fazer exercícios de respiração ajuda a controlar a ansiedade.
pronunciation: fah-ZEHR eh-zehr-SEE-syoos jee hehs-pee-rah-SOHNG ah-ZHOO-dah ah coohn-troo-LAHR ah ahyn-see-eh-DAH-jee.
back: Doing breathing exercises helps control anxiety.
context: Discussing wellness coping mechanisms using 'exercícios de respiração'.

front: Eu uso um aplicativo para cronometrar os intervalos do circuito.
pronunciation: ew OO-zoo oong ah-plee-kah-CHEE-voo PAH-rah kroo-noo-meh-TRAHR ooz eehyn-tehr-VAH-loos doo seer-KWEE-too.
back: I use an app to time the intervals of the circuit.
context: Tracking HIIT or bodyweight loops using the precise verb 'cronometrar'.

front: A musculação me ajuda a proteger as articulações.
pronunciation: ah moos-koo-lah-SOHNG mee ah-ZHOO-dah ah proo-teh-ZHEHR ahs ahr-chee-koo-lah-SOHNGS.
back: Weight training helps me protect my joints.
context: Stating resistance training health properties using 'musculação'.

front: Sempre bebo água antes de sentir sede de verdade.
pronunciation: SAYMP-ree BEH-boo AH-gwah AHN-chees jee seeyn-TEER SEH-jee jee vehr-DAH-jee.
back: I always drink water before truly feeling thirsty.
context: Explaining proactive hydration parameters using 'sentir sede'.

front: Estou muito orgulhoso de manter a constância nos treinos.
pronunciation: ees-TOY MOOI-too oohr-gool-YOH-zoo jee mahn-TEHR ah cohns-TAHN-syah noos TRAY-noo.
back: I am very proud of keeping consistency in workouts.
context: Celebrating personal fitness habit milestones. Female speakers use 'orgulhosa'.
